gaps.requirement: The ratified FORK decision (fork supermemoryai/supermemory apps/browser-extension, MIT, as F1's living base; transplant mem0ai/mem0-chrome-extension + Vineetpandey0/Context-Sync MIT selector/event-dispatch code as pattern-mines) carries exactly one standing legal obligation: preserve the copyright/license notice on every borrowed MIT file that Orvex ships. No story produces or CI-verifies a third-party attribution / upstream-provenance artifact for the transplanted code.
gaps.quote: License: both candidates are MIT тАФ clean for a Chrome-Web-Store-distributed, Orvex-backend-connected extension; only obligation is preserving copyright/license notice on borrowed files. ... Obligation for MIT: preserve the copyright/license notice in any copied file. Apache-2.0 additionally grants an explicit patent license and asks for NOTICE-file preservation ... log it per canon's no-fallbacks/no-shims discipline.
gaps.why_uncovered: E1-S2 (ENG-2712) is the INVERSE control тАФ an AGPL/@orvex/engine import DENYLIST that blocks copyleft/engine code INBOUND; it neither emits nor checks the attribution NOTICE the MIT license requires for the permissive code Orvex COPIES OUTBOUND. E1-S3 (ENG-2713) CSP connect-src + the bundle-network-audit already own STRIPPING inherited phone-home (api.mem0.ai / api.supermemory.ai) and E4-S3 (ENG-2723) owns no-exfiltration behaviour тАФ so the fork-provenance strip-audit is covered. What NOTHING in the 575-story corpus, the extension pack (ENG-2711..2730), the gap fixes (ENG-2696..2710), or the definition packs owns is the third-party attribution/provenance manifest: which files were transplanted from supermemory@<commit> / mem0-chrome-extension / Context-Sync under which license, plus the preserved upstream copyright headers, plus a CI gate proving borrowed files keep their notice. This is the sole explicit legal precondition to distributing the forked bundle on the Chrome Web Store and it is unowned.
gaps.verdict: CONFIRMED тАФ source IgOjzk034v ┬з1/┬з6 quote verified verbatim against the local working copy (technical-cross-ai-delivery-oss-prior-art-research-2026-07-15.md); grep of feature-map.txt, breakdown/*/plan.json (incl. extension), fix-specs.json (ENG-2696..2710), and read of E1-S2/E1-S3/E4-S3/E6-S1 bodies confirm no story owns outbound MIT-notice/provenance attribution (E1-S2 is inbound AGPL-denylist only, E1-S3/E4-S3 are permission/exfiltration scope, E6-S1 is store-review-lint, none emit a THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES artifact); proposed_issue project 'Orvex Studio Extension' and blocked_by ENG-2690 (definition pack, dispatch gate) + ENG-2711 (E1-S1, CI/build host) are both correct per the plan.json ENG-2711..2730 numbering and the sibling-story convention; CLI E4-S2 cross-reference in the body is a real, correctly-distinguished analogous story.

proposed_issue.title: [extension] Third-party attribution + upstream-provenance manifest for the forked supermemory base + mem0/Context-Sync MIT transplants (MIT notice-preservation gate)
proposed_issue.body_md:
## 1 ЁЯОп Story

As the **extension release owner** I want **a checked-in THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES + upstream-provenance manifest that records every file transplanted from an OSS base (supermemory fork, mem0/Context-Sync pattern-mines), the upstream repo@commit + SPDX license it came from, and its preserved copyright header, enforced by a CI gate** so that **the Chrome-Web-Store-distributed bundle satisfies the one standing MIT obligation the FORK decision names тАФ preserving the copyright/license notice on borrowed files тАФ and no transplanted file can ship stripped of its attribution.**

**Definition of Done:** one named test `TestForkedFilesCarryNoticeAndProvenance` (integration/CI тАФ every source file tagged as third-party-derived in the provenance manifest is asserted to retain a non-empty upstream copyright/license header; the shipped bundle contains a THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES artifact enumerating supermemory + mem0-chrome-extension + Context-Sync with their SPDX id + upstream repo@commit; a planted transplanted file with its notice removed turns the gate RED). *This is a build-provenance gate, not a runtime feature тАФ it complements, never restates, E1-S2's inbound AGPL denylist and E1-S3's connect-src strip.* **Dispatch-blocked** until ENG-2690 pins the exact fork base + upstream commit(s) and the manifest schema.

## 2 тЬЕ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] **AC1** тАФ Given the forked/transplanted source tree, When the provenance manifest is read, Then it enumerates each third-party-derived path with its upstream `repo@commit` and SPDX license id (`supermemoryai/supermemory` MIT, `mem0ai/mem0-chrome-extension` MIT, `Vineetpandey0/Context-Sync` MIT). *Assert: every file flagged `third_party: true` has a non-empty `{repo, commit, spdx}` triple.* [Source: IgOjzk034v ┬з1 (FORK recommendation), ┬з6 (permissive candidates + MIT obligation)]
- [ ] **AC2** тАФ Given a file listed in the manifest, When its header is scanned, Then the original MIT copyright + license notice is preserved verbatim. *Assert: static scan finds the upstream copyright line; missing тЖТ fail.* [Source: IgOjzk034v ┬з6 ("preserve the copyright/license notice in any copied file")]
- [ ] **AC3** тАФ Given the packaged store bundle, When it is built, Then a `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES` artifact is emitted listing every upstream project + license text. *Assert: build output contains the notices file with all three MIT projects named.* [Source: IgOjzk034v ┬з1, ┬з6 (Chrome-Web-Store-distributed fork)]
- [ ] **AC4 (negative)** тАФ Given a PR that adds a transplanted file without a manifest entry, or strips a preserved notice, When CI runs, Then the provenance gate is RED and names the offending path. *Assert: notice-stripped fixture тЖТ non-zero exit.* [Source: IgOjzk034v ┬з6 ("log it per canon's no-fallbacks/no-shims discipline")]

## 3 ЁЯФи Tasks

- [ ] RED: `TestForkedFilesCarryNoticeAndProvenance` (AC1тАУAC4).
- [ ] GREEN: author the `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES` + provenance manifest (`repo@commit`+SPDX per transplanted path), preserve upstream headers on every borrowed file, wire the notice/provenance CI gate + bundle-emission step.
- [ ] Seed the manifest from ENG-2690's pinned fork base commit; leave Apache-2.0 NOTICE handling as a documented no-op branch (none in scope, but the gate must not silently skip it).

## 4 ЁЯза Context

The FORK ruling (IgOjzk034v ┬з1/┬з9) transplants MIT code from a live base (supermemory `apps/browser-extension`) plus two pattern-mines (mem0-chrome-extension archived 2026-03-23; Context-Sync). ┬з6 states the *only* MIT obligation is notice-preservation on copied files тАФ a legal precondition to distributing the bundle, which is exactly the class of build-vs-buy work the sweep hunts for. E1-S2 (ENG-2712) blocks AGPL/engine imports *inbound*; E1-S3 (ENG-2713) CSP + bundle-network-audit strip inherited phone-home; this story is the missing *outbound* attribution counterpart тАФ orthogonal to both. Tier placement: repo-root `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES` + `provenance/` manifest + a CI step (a build-provenance boundary, not a service tier), analogous to CLI E4-S2's clean-room provenance manifest but for permissive-inbound rather than AGPL-exclusion.

**ЁЯз╛ Gap provenance (2026-07-15):** filed from the ratified extension canon sweep.

## 5 ЁЯзк Testing

Named DoD `TestForkedFilesCarryNoticeAndProvenance` (CI/static). Tiers: static (header scan + manifest completeness) + integration (bundle emits the notices artifact). CS ┬з5: assert against the real built bundle + real source tree, never a mocked manifest. Fixtures: one notice-stripped file (RED), one unlisted transplanted file (RED).

## 6 ЁЯУП Guidance

CS `6aMAzsYeQb` ┬з┬з0/4/6/7/10/11 (┬з10 attribution invariant, ┬з6 build-provenance boundary, anti-slop тАФ no faked notices); SE-Arch `8sYi523i4t` lenses: Provenance/license-boundary, no-legacy-shims. The notice gate is a hard gate, not a warning.

## 7 ЁЯФЧ References

- Prior-art canon `IgOjzk034v` ┬з1 (FORK recommendation), ┬з6 (licensing & distribution: MIT notice obligation, three permissive fork sources), ┬з9 (what forking reduces / what remains).
- Upstream sources: `supermemoryai/supermemory` (MIT), `mem0ai/mem0-chrome-extension` (MIT), `Vineetpandey0/Context-Sync` (MIT) тАФ all per IgOjzk034v ┬з11.

## 8 ЁЯФЧ Dependencies

- [ ] Blocked by: **ENG-2690** (Definition Pack тАФ pins the exact fork base + upstream commit(s) + manifest schema; dispatch gate); **ENG-2711** (E1-S1 scaffold hosts the CI + bundle build).
- [ ] Sibling (not blocked-by, must not overlap): **ENG-2712** (E1-S2 inbound AGPL denylist), **ENG-2713** (E1-S3 permissions/CSP strip), **ENG-2723** (E4-S3 no-exfiltration).
- [ ] Blocks: **ENG-2727** (E6-S1 store packaging тАФ cannot submit the bundle without the notices artifact).

## 9 ЁЯУб Protocol

CLAIM тЖТ PLAN тЖТ PROGRESS тЖТ COMMITS ("Part of ENG-NNN", never closes) тЖТ HANDOFF тЖТ REVIEW (reviewer тЙа implementer, license/provenance lens) тЖТ TICK тЖТ DONE (orchestrator-only) тЖТ ESCALATE on any transplanted file lacking a manifest entry or a preserved notice.
